content.raw:
About Kris Krüg

Techartist, quasi-sage, cyberpunk anti-hero from the future.

My name is Kris Krüg. I am an AI keynote speaker, creative technologist, photographer, community builder, and culture hacker working at the messy edge where technology, creativity, ethics, and human weirdness collide.

The mission has not changed: humanize technology, fight apathy, democratize creative tools, and build communities with enough courage and imagination to shape what comes next.

Book me to speak See current work

What I am building now

These days my work orbits AI, community infrastructure, and creative practice. I help people make sense of machine intelligence without surrendering taste, culture, relationships, or responsibility.

I lead and support AI ecosystem work in British Columbia, give keynotes and workshops for creative and leadership audiences, build standalone learning portals around major talks, and help teams turn AI from vague pressure into useful practice.

Start with the live projects

BC + AI Ecosystem

Community and industry infrastructure for a responsible and inclusive AI future in British Columbia.

Both Hands Full

A keynote portal about keeping our souls intact while the machines get very good at making everything.

Punk Rock AI

Creative rebellion, human agency, and making culture with the tools without flattening ourselves into content machines.

Developing an AI Mindset

A practical starting point for teams and organizations learning to work with AI.

The throughline

Humanize technology

Technology should resonate with the heartbeat of human experience, not bulldoze it. The point is not novelty. The point is agency, empathy, ethics, and imagination.

Fight apathy

I would rather be in the ring than in the stands: challenging indifference, turning passive media consumption into active creation, and helping people participate.

Democratize art

Art is not a rarefied luxury. It is a common language. The best creative tools should help more people find their voice, not make everyone sound the same.

Build community

Communities are how ideas become durable. Convening is not a side quest; it is infrastructure for trust, courage, and collective action.

From camera to community infrastructure

For decades I have worked as a photographer, media maker, organizer, educator, and digital strategist across technology, arts, activism, conferences, festivals, and social movements. The camera taught me how to pay attention. The internet taught me how networks move. AI is teaching all of us how much more fiercely we need to protect context, consent, taste, and memory.

Things people bring me in for

  • AI keynote speaking
  • AI mindset workshops
  • Creative technology strategy
  • Community and ecosystem building
  • Executive AI briefings
  • Event design and facilitation
  • Documentary and editorial photography
  • Knowledge-base and archive strategy
  • Digital storytelling
  • Responsible AI conversations

Want the useful door?

For current projects, start with Work. For keynotes, go to Speaking. For applied help with AI, creative strategy, or community systems, start with Services. For everything strange and specific, contact me directly.

Work Speaking Services Contact

excerpt.raw:
My name is Kris Krug – a boundary-pushing Creative Explorer, an intuitive Tech Whisperer, and a tenacious Culture Hacker. 

In the fabric of the digital era, where technology often overshadows humanity, I've taken it upon myself to chart a different course. I’m on a relentless mission to humanize technology, to infuse it with empathy, ethics, and emotion.
